documents.author: Dr. Okafor
documents.title: Atrial fibrillation diagnosed
documents.text: On 2025-11-03, James O'Sullivan (MRN-008830) presented with palpitations. ECG confirmed atrial fibrillation. Dr. Okafor initiated anticoagulation planning.

documents.author: Dr. Okafor
documents.title: Started warfarin 5mg
documents.text: On 2025-11-03, Dr. Okafor started warfarin 5mg daily with INR monitoring for stroke prevention in atrial fibrillation.

documents.author: Dr. Okafor
documents.title: Switched to apixaban 5mg
documents.text: On 2026-01-18, due to unstable INR, warfarin was stopped and James O'Sullivan was switched to apixaban 5mg twice daily by Dr. Okafor.

documents.author: Dr. Singh
documents.title: Stage 3 chronic kidney disease
documents.text: On 2026-02-22, eGFR was 48. Dr. Singh diagnosed stage 3 chronic kidney disease and advised renal dosing review.

documents.author: Dr. Okafor
documents.title: Sulfa allergy documented
documents.text: On 2026-03-15, James O'Sullivan developed hives after trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole. A sulfa allergy was documented by Dr. Okafor.
